title: HN Hiring: Nomad Health | Software Engineers | New York, NY and Charlotte, NC | Full-Time,
text: Nomad Health | Software Engineers | New York, NY and Charlotte, NC | Full-Time, REMOTE available * Help Nomad put clinicians on the front lines of the battle against COVID-19. * Nomad Health is changing the way nurses and doctors find work. We are eliminating the chaotic and inelegant healthcare staffing system of yesterday with a simple and modern digital platform. A team of builders and makers, our engineers are creative, highly-motivated problem solvers who want to improve the world of healthcare with code, technology systems, data and automation. We are serving our clinicians who are on the front lines every day fighting this pandemic that is impacting so many lives. If you're interested in making an impact far greater than your next line of code, come check us out! Seeking: Front-end Engineers (React, Next.js) Back-end Engineers (Python, Flask)  https://nomadhealth.com/careers
